title: Public Health Media Library

Redistribution of CDC syndicated content is not allowed. 
The attribution and link back to the original content provider as supplied by this system remains visible and intact. 
Use of the CDC logo is not permitted unless granted through a separate license. 
Per Federal statute (42 U.S.C. 1320b-10), it is not permitted, for a fee, to reproduce, reprint or redistribute CDC content unless expressly granted and documented by CDC. 
CDC reserves the right to include or apply special codes and to track usage and gauge feedback and ratings of its syndicated content. 
Please note that: 
The use or display of syndicated content from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC) does not does not imply endorsement or government sanction of any third party causes, ideas, web sites, products or services by the CDC. 
CDC syndicated content is subject to change without notice. 
If you have any questions about these Usage Guidelines, please contact IMTech@cdc.gov.
Disclaimer
